title: Clear?
text: Clear? Determines whether the screen is cleared before and after running a form that runs another form. Applicable only when the form is run in character mode. True or False (Default). Value Description True All other open forms disappear when this form is run. (The screen is cleared before and after running a form that runs another form.) False (Default). The form is displayed in front of whatever else is present in the application window at the time. Use this to display a non-movable component on top of another component, making it appear as part of the underlying component. Applies To Form Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
